data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances security by requiring additional verification methods.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS, email, and authenticator apps

data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Data in transit and at rest are encrypted using robust protocols.

data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Monitors and detects potential threats in real-time.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Prevents unauthorized data transfers or leaks.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Routine scans and patches are applied to protect against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Qualys for scanning and remediation
